title: Internal wires clash with user symbols

features.name: underscore-s number wire declaration
features.description: Code should include a wire or reg declaration with a name matching the pattern underscore-s followed by a number (e.g., _s6), which collides with internally generated wire names

features.name: underscore-s number parameter collision
features.description: Code should include a parameter declaration with a name matching the pattern underscore-s followed by a number, which can collide with internally generated wire names during synthesis
